user.title: Connect to Genmon
user.description: Enter the connection details for your genmon instance. The API key can be found in the genmon web UI under Settings > Home Assistant Integration (Native).

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of your genmon device
data_description.port: Port number for the genhalink addon (default: 9083)
data_description.api_key: API key auto-generated when the genhalink addon is enabled

zeroconf_confirm.title: Genmon Generator Discovered

data_description.api_key: API key from genmon Settings > Home Assistant Integration (Native)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Genmon
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your genmon instance.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to genmon. Verify the host, port, and that the genhalink addon is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Check the key in genmon Settings > Home Assistant Integration (Native).

abort.already_configured: This genmon instance is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll genmon for updates (2-60 seconds, default: 5). WebSocket push updates are always active.
data_description.blacklist: Comma-separated keywords to exclude from entity creation (case-insensitive, matches any path containing the keyword). Top-level sections: Status, Maintenance, Outage, Monitor, Tiles. Examples: 'Tiles', 'Weather', 'Platform Stats', 'Last Log Entries', 'Serial Number'.
data_description.button_passcode: Passcode or password required by controller buttons that accept user input (e.g. MEBAY controllers). Leave blank if your controller buttons do not require a passcode.
